title: Excel export conform view

posts.author: Jaco (Jaco Breet)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company is using Monday a lot, but we are missing the option to download the data from a board/view in a way that matches the current view, so with sort, filter and without hidden columns. The export now shows all the data from te main view. Although it is possible to download all the items from a group the come in a raw form (at least the actual sort order would be very nice).

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree, this would be really helpful. Save the manual effort of then having to delete the columns that you had hidden.
Although I can scenarios where you might want to show everything depending on the intended audience, it would be great when you clicked Export to have the option to show the hidden columns or keep them hidden.
